mapper.sql: p.id, p.user_id, p.points, p.type, p.description, p.related_id, p.create_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO points (user_id, points, type, description, related_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{points}, #{type}, #{description}, #{relatedId})
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM points p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id
AND u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%')
SELECT FROM points p WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND p.type = '签到' AND DATE(p.create_time) = #{today} ORDER BY p.create_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM points p WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND p.type = '长期租赁奖励' AND DATE(p.create_time) = #{today} ORDER BY p.create_time DESC LIMIT 1
